creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
I hoped this would be fixed upstream, but I just got reply on squid-users mailing list it won't:

http://lists.squid-cache.org/pipermail/squid-users/2018-December/019862.html

Last time I checked a month ago, www/squid (squid-4.3_1) was unusable on FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE. I'll check if there are any improvements. Hopefully we won't end up without production-usable squid on FreeBSD 12.
